title: elatostema umbellatum var. involucratum
intro: Elatostema umbellatum var. involucratum, also known as the involucrate Elatostema, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant protection. Elatostema umbellatum var. involucratum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal purposes.
